nasb.text: and raised us up with Him, and seated us with Him in the heavenly places in Christ Jesus,

esv.text: and raised us up with him and seated us with him in the heavenly places in Christ Jesus,

cnv.text: 又使我們在基督耶穌裡，與他一同復活，一同坐在天上，

ccb.text: 在基督耶稣里，上帝使我们与基督一同复活，一同坐在天上，

csbs.text: 神又使我们在基督耶稣里，与基督一同复活、一同坐在天上，
